generated.findings: The heart size and pulmonary vascularity appear within normal limits. The lungs are free of focal airspace disease. No pleural effusion or pneumothorax is seen. A well-circumscribed 11 mm right upper lobe nodule, unchanged from previous examination 7 years ago.
generated.impression: No evidence of active cardiopulmonary disease. No acute cardiopulmonary abnormality.
generated.recommendation: Further evaluation recommended for the right upper lobe nodule.
generated.disclaimer: Clinical uncertainty exists due to low agreement score (0.60).

ground_truth.findings: Hyperexpansion of the lungs with hyperlucency and flattening of hemidiaphragms suggestive of chronic emphysematous lung disease. Heart size within normal limits. Bibasilar, right greater than left atelectasis/airspace disease noted. No pneumothorax or large pleural effusion. No acute bony abnormality.
ground_truth.impression: Chronic emphysematous lung disease with mild bibasilar, right greater than left airspace disease/atelectasis.
